subcodes.first_line: O servants and maidservants of the All-Merciful! It can truly be said that, upon the Path of God, ye are in hardship and immersed in an ocean of toil and trouble
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان و اماء رحمان فی الحقیقه در سبیل الهی در مشقتید و مستغرق در دریای تعب
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
